calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 501 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Rachel C. Buhay.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:49:58 a.m. and adjourning at 11:06:38 a.m.

Plaintiff Synchrony Bank represented by Carina Jordan, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant failed to appear at trial.

AMY BELTRAMI (Custodian of Records) is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.
Plaintiff proceeds with an offer of proof.

The following exhibit is MARKED/ADMITTED into evidence:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Monthly Billing Statements

The matter is submitted.
Court finds in favor of Plaintiff and awards the following judgment:

1. Principal Sum: $7,266.28
2. Costs: $294.50

Total Judgment: $7,7560.78

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-01-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
